policy.cleanup_action: Remove the rust lane from the tigrbl feature row; keep true Rust obligations in tigrbl_rs-local rows or true bridge/parity coordination rows.
policy.preserved: Python runtime lanes, feature ids, claims, tests, specs, ADRs, lifecycle, implementation status, and true rust required/planned/supported lanes.
policy.rust_not_applicable_meaning: The feature is not a Rust runtime obligation in this source registry.

purpose: Removed rust.not_applicable runtime lane metadata from tigrbl-local feature rows after tigrbl_rs split/localization decision.
